brief_html:
Swaps the item in the player's cursor buffer with one in the player's inventory. Please note:
This message's official name is not known, and has been invented.
format:
(UINT32) Item ID - Item to place in inventory (cursor buffer)
(UINT32) Item ID - Item to be replaced
(UINT32) X coordinate for replace
(UINT32) Y coordinate for replace
remarks_html:
